summary: HomePage hero was updated to use a local animated GIF with a reduced-motion fallback via <picture>, but the requested generated asset file is not shown as added, and the legacy /assets/sioj.png is still referenced (as the reduced-motion fallback). The diff also includes unrelated homepage content/navigation/feature changes not requested for the hero swap.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add the new animated hero asset file under frontend/public/assets/generated using the specified filename (home-hero-animated.dim_1400x900.gif).
missing_requirements.reason: Diff shows no added files; only HomePage.tsx was modified to reference the GIF. There is no evidence the GIF was actually added under frontend/public/assets/generated.
evidence: File diff summary: ADDED FILES: none

missing_requirements.requirement: Home page hero no longer renders/uses the static image at src="/assets/sioj.png".
missing_requirements.reason: HomePage hero still references /assets/sioj.png in the <source srcSet=...> element used for prefers-reduced-motion fallback, so the static asset is still part of the hero rendering path.

hallucinated_features.description: Homepage feature set/content expanded/changed (e.g., added "Alphabet & Numbers" module card/link) beyond swapping the hero media.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest non-goals state not to change homepage copy or navigation beyond what is required to swap the hero media; diff shows feature definitions and links that are unrelated to the hero asset replacement.
evidence: frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx (features array includes "Alphabet & Numbers" with link '/alphabet-numbers')
frontend-file-summaries.txt (HomePage summary mentions expanded feature cards including Alphabet & Numbers module)

hallucinated_features.description: Added an animated mascot decoration (robot cat) to the Home page features section.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by REQ-24/REQ-25; it is an additional visual/animation change unrelated to the hero swap.
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt (HomePage summary mentions animated mascot decoration)

hallucinated_features.description: Homepage hero and/or page copy appears changed (headline/description/buttons), not strictly required for swapping hero media.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly lists changing homepage copy/navigation as a non-goal; diff shows substantial hero text/button markup present but cannot confirm prior content due to truncation—still indicates changes beyond just swapping the hero media.
evidence: frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx (hero heading "Welcome to Bagnan Shiksha Niketan" and paragraph about coaching; two CTA buttons)
